headline: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (HWM): Among Aerospace and Defense Stocks with the Largest 5Y Share Price Returns
summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) is among the 8 Aerospace and Defense Stocks with the Largest 5Y Share Price Returns. The stock has returned 698% over the past five years. headline: Defense Stocks Show Split Personality: Growth vs. Value Divergence Widens
summary: Defense stocks show a split: growth names like Howmet Aerospace and Curtiss-Wright command high valuations, while value plays Lockheed Martin and Northrop Grumman trade cheap with strong profitability but weak momentum.
